reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://thewirecutter.com/reviews/best-travel-pillow/ and extract every travel pillow they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, fill material, weight, washability, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.wired.com/gallery/best-travel-pillows/ and extract every travel pillow they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, fill material, key features, pros with specific travel test details, cons.

Go to https://www.travelandleisure.com/style/travel-accessories/travel-neck-pillow-reviews and extract every travel pillow they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, fill material, weight, key features, pros with specific tester feedback, cons.

Go to https://www.sleepfoundation.org/best-pillows/best-travel-pillow and extract every travel pillow they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, fill material, firmness, trial period, warranty, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.businessinsider.com/guides/travel/best-travel-pillows and extract every travel pillow they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, fill material, key features, pros with specific travel test details, cons.
